title: request_break_if_needed
description: Check whether the current session has run past a threshold and, if so, return the elapsed duration, the user's original stated intent, and a suggested action. Returns null when no break is warranted. Designed to be called repeatedly without producing noise.

threshold_minutes.description: Minutes after which a break should be suggested. Callers SHOULD source this from the user's profile (chronometric.hyperfocus_break_minutes) rather than hardcoding. Range 1-480 prevents accidentally-disabled checks and meaningless 8h+ thresholds.

oneOf.description: Returned when there is no open session, or the open session has not yet reached the threshold. Callers MUST handle null.
Returned when a break is warranted.

elapsed.description: ISO 8601 duration the current session has been open.

prior_intent.description: The user's verbatim stated intent from mark_session_start. Surfaced so nudges can quote the user back to themselves rather than scolding them.

suggested_action.description: A coarse-grained suggested next action. Skills are free to ignore or rephrase; the enum exists to keep suggestions consistent across the substrate.

threshold_minutes.description: Echo of the threshold that triggered this response, for debugging.

escalation.description: Optional (added v0.1.x per ADR 0011). Coarse escalation rung. 'nudge' (default, today's behaviour) when the session crossed the threshold outside any protected window. 'hard_surface' when the current local time falls inside a profile.chronometric.protected_windows entry — the firm rung, applied because the window itself is protected, so it can fire even below the threshold. Surfaced so skills can quote the user back to themselves (e.g. the protected window they set) rather than scolding them. Absent when the profile declares no protected windows and the legacy threshold path produced the suggestion without an escalation rung.

protected_window_label.description: Optional (added v0.1.x per ADR 0011). The optional human label of the matched protected window, surfaced when 'escalation' is 'hard_surface' and the window carried a label. Absent otherwise.

THRESHOLD_OUT_OF_RANGE.description: threshold_minutes was outside the 1-480 allowed range.

THRESHOLD_REQUIRED.description: threshold_minutes was missing. There is intentionally no default; callers must declare intent.

examples.name: session has exceeded a 90-minute hyperfocus threshold

compatibility.policy: Additive-only within v0.1.x. The suggested_action enum may grow (additive) but values MUST NOT be renamed or removed without a major bump. Callers MUST treat unknown enum values defensively (treat as 'switch_context').
compatibility.side_effects: None. Pure read. Does not record that the break was suggested — that is a deliberate separation of concerns; skills that surface the suggestion should themselves log it if desired.
compatibility.privacy: Reads local session state only. No remote calls.
